## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content direction focusing on less technical, thought leadership articles showing promise](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Plans to create a series of interconnected articles on AI agents and data analytics skills](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [Website improvements underway, including potential new blog layout and self-service publishing](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Exploring ways to identify bot traffic on the Prophecy website](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance and Strategy

  - [Overall traffic trend remains positive, with a slight dip in recent weeks](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Google continues as main traffic source; ChatGPT leads LLM referrals](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - ["12 Essential Data Using Skills" blog post performing exceptionally well](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=112.0)
  - [New content cluster based on recent direction change; 4 articles completed](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Shifting focus to less technical, more thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)
  - [Emphasis on positioning Prophecy as enabling non-technical people to become analytics experts](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Content Series and Interlinking

  - [Considering creation of article series on topics like AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Plans to interlink content more effectively to build authority and improve user experience](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Aim to create foundational content (e.g., "What Are AI Agents?") to establish Prophecy as a trusted resource](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)
  - [Exploring sports metaphors to explain data analytics teamwork concepts](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Website Improvements

  - [Bonfire team working on infrastructure and fixes](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Potential blog layout update to enable self-service publishing](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct a thorough audit of the website](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Consideration of prophecy.ai domain implementation](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)

### Collaboration and Interviews

  - [Proposal to conduct 20-minute interviews with Prophecy team members (e.g., May, Ravi) for thought leadership content](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [Plan to use interview content for direct quotes, standalone pieces, and context for content generation](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)

### Analytics and Tracking

  - [Discussion on identifying bot traffic on the Prophecy website](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [No immediate solution found; team to investigate further](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Ehtisham to investigate performance of "X Data Analyst Skills for the Modern Data Landscape" article](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=822.0)
  - [Cody to initiate process for internal team member interviews](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1073.0)
  - [Ashleigh to share Bonfire team's progress document with GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct website audit and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Team to explore methods for identifying bot traffic on the website](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [Continue developing interconnected content series on AI agents and data analytics](https://fathom.video/share/tsiMFNy_esWE3McUjGTkTnrYnpd1RUZx?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
